This is the long-form fixture post. Catbird renders posts up to three hundred graphemes, so this one exercises line wrapping, dynamic type, and truncation behavior in the feed. 🧵

It has two paragraphs, an emoji or two ✨, and it ends with just enough text to brush against the limit of the lexicon.

Oh yeah I know Jimothy. Went to high school with him. Weird guy. Loved trash

i want to do a little ✨ ama about atproto ✨ in this thread. no question is too simple

if you’ve been curious about atproto but don’t know much (anything?) about it, ask any question and i’ll try to explain it in my own words.

(+ would love to hear from friends who aren’t very active on bsky)

value.text: I just watched it from the sidelines since I moved out of product. Those poor folks tried it twice before getting blocked due to ecosystem readiness issues. Finally doing it... yeah it's great

record.text:
Oh ha! I was genuinely interested!

I imagine this means more platform level thinking for Bluesky PBC, AT Proto, and PLC Directory - rather than day-to-day mobile and web app product decisions?
